themes.description: Exposure tied to AI compute, semiconductors, cloud platforms, data centers, and enabling infrastructure.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may increase sensitivity to AI capex cycles, semiconductor supply, and growth-tech drawdowns.
themes.advisor_description: Use when explaining how much of the portfolio is connected to the AI buildout.
themes.short_description: AI compute, cloud, semiconductor, and infrastructure exposure.
caveats: Synthetic mapping only; not a security-level research taxonomy.

themes.description: Exposure likely to react to changes in rates, duration, credit spreads, or financing conditions.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter more in rate-shock and refinancing-stress discussions.
themes.advisor_description: Use when framing where the portfolio may be most exposed to rate moves.
themes.short_description: Rate, curve, duration, and financing sensitivity.
caveats: Does not model full yield-curve construction.

themes.description: Exposure to private, opaque, stale-marked, or slower-liquidity assets.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may reduce near-term flexibility and increase reliance on confidence caveats.
themes.advisor_description: Use when discussing liquidity, valuation confidence, or private-market stress.
themes.short_description: Private-market, opaque, stale-mark, and liquidity-stress exposure.
caveats: Private marks may be stale or proxy-based in the synthetic fixtures.

themes.description: Exposure tied to power, energy supply, real assets, and energy bottlenecks.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter in energy-shock or infrastructure-resilience conversations.
themes.advisor_description: Use when connecting energy supply conditions to portfolio exposures.
themes.short_description: Energy supply, power, and infrastructure bottleneck exposure.
caveats: Energy-security mapping is synthetic and not commodity research.

themes.description: Exposure tied to credit spread widening, refinancing stress, and private-credit marks.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may pressure fixed income, private credit, and lower-liquidity credit holdings.
themes.advisor_description: Use when asking whether credit risk is concentrated across income and private-market allocations.
caveats: Credit stress is inferred from synthetic tags and scenario hints.

themes.description: Exposure tied to USD cash, USD-denominated assets, and currency-sensitive hedges.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter when discussing currency strength, cash reserves, and USD funding conditions.
themes.advisor_description: Use when separating USD liquidity and currency effects from broader asset allocation.
themes.short_description: USD cash, currency, and dollar-sensitive exposure.
caveats: Currency exposure is simplified in the synthetic fixture.

themes.description: Exposure tied to Asia supply-chain, semiconductor, and geopolitical disruption sensitivity.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter in semiconductor supply-chain and Taiwan-disruption conversations.
themes.advisor_description: Use when connecting supply-chain disruption risk to technology and AI infrastructure exposure.

themes.description: Exposure tied to inflation-linked, commodity, real-estate, and infrastructure-like assets.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may create partial ballast in inflation or energy scenarios, with liquidity caveats.
themes.advisor_description: Use when discussing whether the portfolio has assets that may offset inflation pressure.
caveats: Inflation-hedge behavior is simplified and scenario-dependent.

themes.description: Exposure tied to data centers, power campuses, cooling, grid upgrades, and AI infrastructure buildout.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may link AI demand to power, real-asset, and private-market risks.
themes.advisor_description: Use when distinguishing direct AI software/chip exposure from physical infrastructure exposure.
caveats: Synthetic demo does not model project-level development risk.

themes.description: Exposure that may depend on household demand, broad equity beta, or consumer spending conditions.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter in growth slowdowns or demand-sensitive stress discussions.
themes.advisor_description: Use when separating economically sensitive public equity exposure from defensive ballast.
caveats: Consumer-demand mapping is a synthetic proxy, not a macro forecast.

themes.description: Exposure to long-duration bonds, rate-sensitive equity, and duration-like private assets.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may amplify losses in upward-rate scenarios and help explain rate-shock sensitivity.
themes.advisor_description: Use when identifying whether rate sensitivity is specifically duration-driven.
caveats: Duration is inferred from synthetic scenario hints rather than key-rate analytics.

themes.description: Exposure tied to cash, defensive ballast, coupons, distributions, and spending-support assets.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may help offset stress but should be separated from guaranteed income claims.
themes.advisor_description: Use when discussing liquidity, cash generation, and stabilizing portfolio roles.
themes.short_description: Cash, income, and defensive ballast exposure.
caveats: Cash generation is not a guaranteed income stream.
